topic.title: Installing the product on your system
topic.shortdesc: This section describes how to install the product.

body.p: Red Hat OpenShift Container Platform provides a comprehensive container orchestration solution. You can install it on supported platforms by using the installer.
Before you begin, ensure that your system meets the prerequisites. The installation process has several stages.

section.title: Before you begin
section.p: Review the following requirements before proceeding:

section.title: Performing the installation
section.p: To install the product, complete the following steps:

ol.li: Download the installer from the customer portal.
Extract the archive to a local directory.
